ticket_title: FE - Simplify app config caching to user preferences only

test_cases.name: TC-1: Locale preference persists across page reload [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: User is logged into the RTGO app (rtgo-web). Locale is currently set to English (en-US). | Test Data: locale = es-ES, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR, browser = Chrome latest

steps.action: Open the locale picker in the header and select Spanish (es-ES).
Verify the UI switches to Spanish.
Perform a hard page reload (Ctrl+Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R).
Inspect localStorage — confirm only preference keys are present (locale, theme, sidebar); no apiUrl or full AppConfig blob.
Observe the locale setting after reload.
steps.expected: The app loads in Spanish (es-ES) without requiring the user to re-select the locale; no full AppConfig object is present in localStorage.

test_cases.name: TC-2: Theme mode persists across page reload [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: User is logged in. Theme is currently set to Light mode. | Test Data: theme = dark, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR, browser = Chrome latest

steps.action: Toggle the theme to Dark mode via the app theme control.
Confirm the UI applies the dark theme (dark CSS class on `<html>`).
Perform a hard page reload.
Observe the theme setting after reload.
steps.expected: Dark mode is active immediately on reload without user intervention; the `theme-mode` localStorage key is present with value `dark`.

test_cases.name: TC-3: Sidebar collapse state persists across page reload [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: User is logged in. Sidebar is in its default state (collapsed per base config). | Test Data: sidebar.collapsed = false (expanded), role = Store Rep, storeType = COR

steps.action: Expand the sidebar using the toggle control.
Confirm the sidebar is fully expanded and navigation labels are visible.
Perform a hard page reload.
Observe the sidebar state after reload.
steps.expected: The sidebar remains expanded after reload; the sidebar collapse state is stored as a preference key in localStorage.

test_cases.name: TC-4: Runtime config (apiUrl) applies immediately without stale cache override [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: App has been loaded at least once (localStorage contains preference keys from a prior session). A new app-config.json is deployed with an updated apiUrl pointing to a different environment. | Test Data: Old apiUrl = https://api-staging.rt2.com, new apiUrl = https://api-uat.rt2.com, role = Store Rep

steps.action: Load the app — localStorage contains preferences from a prior session (old env).
Deploy / update app-config.json with a new apiUrl.
Perform a hard page reload.
Intercept the first API call made by the app (e.g., via browser DevTools Network tab or test proxy).
Confirm the request base URL matches the new apiUrl from runtime config.
Inspect localStorage — confirm apiUrl is NOT stored as a cached key.
steps.expected: All API requests use the new apiUrl from the runtime config; apiUrl is absent from localStorage; no stale environment value is applied.

test_cases.name: TC-5: Automatic migration from legacy full-config cache format [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: localStorage contains a legacy app-config key storing a full serialized AppConfig JSON blob (old cache format), with locale = es-ES, theme.mode = dark, sidebar.collapsed = false. | Test Data: Inject legacy cache: localStorage.setItem('<appNamespace>_app-config', JSON.stringify({value: {locale:{default:'es-ES',...}, theme:{mode:'dark',...}, sidebar:{collapsed:false,...}, apiUrl:'https://api-old.rt2.com',...}}))

steps.action: Inject the legacy full-AppConfig blob into localStorage before page load (via DevTools or test fixture).
Load the app fresh (first load after deploying the new config-caching code).
Verify locale, theme, and sidebar state are read from the migrated preferences.
Inspect localStorage — confirm old full-blob key is removed and replaced with individual preference keys.
Confirm apiUrl from the injected blob is NOT applied (runtime config value should win).
steps.expected: User preferences (locale es-ES, dark theme, expanded sidebar) are preserved post-migration; apiUrl from the old blob is discarded; localStorage contains only the new preference-only keys.

test_cases.name: TC-6: Regression — activation flow unaffected by config refactor [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Store Rep is logged into rtgo-web. Config is loaded normally from runtime app-config.metro.json. No stale localStorage cache exists (cleared before test). | Test Data: deviceType = Handset, IMEI = valid TAC, ICCID = valid, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR, plan = standard Metro prepaid

steps.action: Clear localStorage for the app namespace to ensure a clean state.
Reload the app and confirm runtime config loads correctly (apiUrl, feature flags available).
Begin a new activation: Customer Info
Complete each activation step through to the IDV screen.
Verify no console errors related to appConfig, CacheManager, or missing configuration values.
steps.expected: Activation flow proceeds normally through all steps; no config-related errors; app settings (auth, featureFlags, apiUrl) are sourced from runtime config, not localStorage.
